title: AI Builders Digest
subtitle: Bilingual edition · 双语对照版

intro.text: 今天这批内容信息密度很高。Sam Altman 宣布 OpenAI Robotics 正式成立，要造真正有用的机器人，短期目标是支持技术工人建设基础设施，长期目标是人人有一个个人机器人。Garry Tan 连发两条谈 AI 记忆主权：「你应该控制并托管自己的记忆」，并预告了 2027 年的 AI harness wars。Swyx 指出 PewDiePie 用 vibecode 做了一个完整的个人 AI 生产力套件登顶 HN，说做不过 PewDiePie 就该回家了。Rauchg 发现 CEO 和 CTO 们正在疯狂地重新写代码。Steipete 让 Codex 当 QA 助手，自动测试并开 PR 修 bug。

archive.title: 记忆主权日报
archive.desc: OpenAI 成立机器人部门、AI 记忆控制权成为下一个战场、PewDiePie 的 vibecode 产品登顶 HN、CEO 们重新爱上写代码。

footerNote: Source: Follow Builders curated daily digest. Rebuilt from the 2026-06-01 source feeds.

sections.title: OpenAI Robotics & the Physical World / OpenAI 机器人与物理世界
sections.desc: Sam Altman 正式宣布 OpenAI 进军机器人，这是从数字到物理的跨越。

rewrite: Sam Altman announces OpenAI Robotics is hiring full-stack hardware, ops, systems, and ML engineers. The thesis: AI should help people in the physical world. Short term: robots supporting skilled workers to build infrastructure. Long term: everyone has a personal robot doing anything they need.
The program evolved from world simulation research led by Aditya Ramesh, based on co-design between robotics hardware and ML research. 11049 likes—this is the biggest announcement of the week.
original: OpenAI Robotics is hiring, looking for exceptional full-stack hardware, ops, systems, and ML engineers to help us program and manufacture robots that are useful for society.

AI should be able to help people in the physical world. In the short term, we are focused on robots to support skilled workers to build our future infrastructure; in the long term, we imagine everyone having a personal robot doing anything they need.

Our world simulation research program, led by Aditya Ramesh, has evolved over the past year into OpenAI Robotics. Progress is rapid, and based on a foundation of co-design between robotics hardware and ML research.

rewrite: Sam Altman 宣布 OpenAI Robotics 开始招聘全栈硬件、运维、系统和 ML 工程师。核心论点：AI 应该在物理世界帮助人。短期：支持技术工人建设基础设施的机器人。长期：人人有一个个人机器人。
项目从 Aditya Ramesh 领导的世界模拟研究演变而来，基于机器人硬件和 ML 研究的协同设计。11049 赞——本周最大的新闻。
original: Altman 宣布 OpenAI Robotics 招聘全栈工程师造机器人。短期支持工人建基础设施，长期人人有个人机器人。从世界模拟研究演变而来。11049 赞。

sections.title: Memory Sovereignty & the AI Harness Wars / 记忆主权与 AI Harness 战争
sections.desc: Garry Tan 连发两条预告下一场平台战争，Levie 从企业角度补充了上下文问题。

rewrite: Garry Tan makes a bold declaration: you should want to control and host your own memory. It's the one thing you should be able to take to any platform. Watch for this to be a defining battle in the new browser war: the AI harness wars of 2027.
1423 likes. The implication: whoever controls your AI memory controls lock-in, and the battle over memory portability will define the next platform war.
original: You should want to control and host your own memory. It's the one thing that you should be able to take to any platform.
Watch for this to be a defining battle in the new browser war: the AI harness wars of 2027.

rewrite: Garry Tan 提了一个大胆的主张：你应该想控制并托管自己的记忆。这是你唯一应该能带到任何平台的东西。注意，这将成为新浏览器战争中的决定性战役：2027 年的 AI harness wars。
1423 赞。含义是：谁控制你的 AI 记忆谁就控制了锁定，围绕记忆可移植性的争夺将定义下一个平台战争。
original: Garry Tan：应控制并托管自己的记忆，能带到任何平台。这将是 2027 年 AI harness wars 的决定性战役。1423 赞。

rewrite: Garry Tan follows up: platforms need to stay open and it shouldn't require a lot of work to get your data. Because where the AI harness wars are going, someone else's harness is just going to be you sharecropping someone else's AI ecosystem.
original: Platforms need to stay open and it shouldn't require a lot of work to get your data. Because where the AI harness wars are going... someone else's harness is just going to be you sharecropping someone else's AI ecosystem.

rewrite: Garry Tan 继续跟进：平台需要保持开放，获取你自己的数据不应该很费事。因为 AI harness wars 的走向是——用别人的 harness 就是在给别人的 AI 生态系统当佃农。
original: Garry Tan：平台要开放，获取数据要简单。用别人的 harness 就是给别人当佃农。300 赞。

rewrite: Aaron Levie identifies the #1 problem for AI agents in the enterprise: the context problem. Going from agentic coding (where context is in the codebase) to knowledge work agents, context becomes much more acute.

At Box they see this daily: existing digital knowledge is fragmented across legacy systems with access controls that don't map to real work. And companies haven't captured critical context—decisions, processes, workflows live in people's heads as tribal knowledge.
His conclusion: this is the biggest leverage point for applied AI companies, and one reason why FDEs and new system integrator plays will work so well right now.
original: This is effectively the #1 problem for AI agents in the enterprise.
Companies often haven't captured and digitized some of the critical context that agents need to work with. Decisions, processes, and workflows often live in people's heads and tribal knowledge.
This is actually one of the biggest points of leverage for applied AI companies.

rewrite: Aaron Levie 指出了企业 AI agent 的头号问题：上下文问题。从 agentic coding（上下文在代码库里）到知识工作 agent，上下文变得更加尖锐。
在 Box 他们每天都在看到：数字知识散落在遗留系统中，访问控制跟实际工作不匹配。而且公司往往没有捕获关键上下文——决策、流程、工作流存在于人们脑中的隐性知识里。
结论是：这是应用型 AI 公司最大的杠杆点，也是 FDE 和新型系统集成商在这个阶段会有效的原因之一。
original: Levie 说上下文是企业 AI agent 头号问题。数字知识散落在遗留系统，关键上下文在人们脑子里。这是应用 AI 公司最大杠杆点。479 赞。

sections.title: The Vibe Shift & Who Can Build / 潮流转变与谁在构建
sections.desc: 当 PewDiePie 都开始做 AI 产品了，CEO 们重新写代码了，构建者的定义正在改变。

rewrite: Swyx zooms out on the vibe shift: in Feb 2025 Soumith Chintala talked about personal, local, private agents and most people didn't believe him. It's June 2026 and PewDiePie released his vibecoded opencode wrapper—a complete personal AI productivity suite including email, docs, calendar. Top of HN, >1M views, >10K stars in a day.
His challenge: if your Knowledge Work Agents startup can't beat PewDiePie you might as well pack up and go home. His is the benchmark for what you can DIY.
original: In Feb 2025 @soumithchintala was talking about his dream of personal, local, private agents, most people didn't believe him.

It's June 2026 and @pewdiepie has just released his vibecoded @opencode wrapper that is a complete personal AI productivity suite including email, docs, and calendar. Top of HN, easily >1m views, >10k stars in a day.
If your Knowledge Work Agents startup can't beat pewdiepie you might as well pack up and go home at this point, his is the benchmark for what you can DIY.

rewrite: Swyx 提供了一个锐利视角：2025 年 2 月 Soumith Chintala 谈个人本地私有 agent 的梦想时，大多数人都不信。2026 年 6 月 PewDiePie 发布了 vibecode 的 opencode 包装器——一个完整的个人 AI 生产力套件，包括邮件、文档和日历。登顶 HN，轻松超过 100 万浏览，一天内超过 1 万 star。
他的挑战：如果你做 Knowledge Work Agents 的创业公司做不过 PewDiePie，还不如收拾回家。他的产品就是你能 DIY 的 benchmark。
original: Swyx：2025 年谈个人私有 agent 没人信，2026 年 PewDiePie 做出完整 AI 生产力套件登顶 HN。做不过 PewDiePie 就回家。137 赞。

rewrite: Guillermo Rauch reports an unexpected trend: CEOs and CTOs are back to coding with a fury thanks to coding agents. Public company CEOs sliding into his DMs telling him about falling in love with shipping software again thanks to Claude Code and Vercel.

His framing: coding agents are the ultimate PLG-fication of the enterprise. Dream accounts where the C-suite could barely understand the infrastructure—now they get it firsthand. Bad legacy software can't hide. The stack that works is self-evident from intern to CEO. 1226 likes.
original: Unclear if a durable trend, but CEOs and CTOs are back to coding with a fury, thanks to coding agents.
I have public company CEOs sliding into my DMs telling me about falling in love with shipping software again thanks to Claude Code and Vercel.
Coding agents are the ultimate PLG-fication of the enterprise. Bad, legacy software can't hide anymore. The stack that works is self-evident to the entire organization, from intern to CEO.

rewrite: Guillermo Rauch 报告了一个出人意料的趋势：CEO 和 CTO 们因 coding agents 疯狂重拾写代码。上市公司 CEO 们私信他说因为 Claude Code 和 Vercel 重新爱上了 ship 软件。
他的框架是：coding agents 是企业 PLG 的终极形式。以前 C-suite 基本不理解基础设施的 dream accounts——现在亲手体验了。差的遗留软件藏不住了。真正有效的技术栈对整个组织来说是不言自明的，从实习生到 CEO。1226 赞。
original: Rauchg：CEO/CTO 因 coding agents 疯狂重拾编码。上市公司 CEO 私信说重新爱上 ship。Coding agents 是企业 PLG 终极形式。差的软件藏不住了。1226 赞。

sections.title: Agent Engineering in Practice / Agent 工程实践
sections.desc: Steipete 让 Codex 当 QA 助手、Swyx 说 evals 公司都在升级——agent 工程正在进化。

rewrite: Steipete has been teaching Codex to be his QA assistant: for every commit it creates a user-test scenario, uses webVNC (crabbox) and computer/browser use (peekaboo/mcporter) to test OpenClaw like a user/QA person would. This runs in the background and opens PRs with fixes. 1008 likes.
This is autoreview taken to the next level: not just reviewing code, but actually testing the product as a user would and fixing what it finds.
original: Been teaching codex to be my QA assistant. For every commit it creates a user-test scenario and uses webVNC (crabbox), computer/browser use (peekaboo/mcporter) to test OpenClaw like a user/QA person would. This runs in the background and opens PRs with fixes.

rewrite: Steipete 一直在教 Codex 当他的 QA 助手：对每个 commit 创建用户测试场景，用 webVNC（crabbox）和 computer/browser use（peekaboo/mcporter）像用户/QA 一样测试 OpenClaw。后台运行，发现问题就开 PR 修复。1008 赞。
这是 autoreview 的下一层：不只 review 代码，而是像用户一样实际测试产品并修复发现的问题。
original: Steipete 教 Codex 当 QA：每次 commit 创建测试场景，用 webVNC 和 browser use 测试，后台运行开 PR 修 bug。1008 赞。

rewrite: Swyx observes that every evals/analytics startup is going through a one-time generational upgrade into a continual learning platform in 2026. Many will fail but as always the tasteful ones win.
This is a structural observation: the market is shifting from static evals to dynamic learning, and the winners will be those who make this transition elegantly.
original: Every evals/analytics startup is going through a onetime generational upgrade into a continual learning platform in 2026. Many will fail but as always the tasteful ones win.

rewrite: Swyx 观察到，每个 evals/analytics 创业公司都在 2026 年经历一次一次性的代际升级——变成持续学习平台。很多会失败，但一如既往，有品味的那些会赢。
这是一个结构性观察：市场正从静态评测转向动态学习，赢家会是那些优雅完成这个转变的公司。
original: Swyx：evals/analytics 公司都在升级成持续学习平台。有品味的赢。245 赞。

rewrite: Steipete articulates OpenClaw's design philosophy: it should always be yours. Modular and lean, only add what you need. Fewer skills, fewer tools = your agent can work more efficiently.
This pairs with Garry Tan's memory sovereignty argument: the agent you use should be lean, modular, and yours to control.
original: The idea of OpenClaw is always that it should be yours. It's modular and lean, only add what you need. Fewer skills, fewer tools = your agent can work more efficiently.

rewrite: Steipete 阐述了 OpenClaw 的设计哲学：它应该永远是你的。模块化且精简，只加你需要的。更少的 skill 和 tool = 你的 agent 更高效。
这和 Garry Tan 的记忆主权论点配合：你用的 agent 应该是精简的、模块化的、由你控制的。
original: Steipete：OpenClaw 应该永远是你的。模块化精简，只加需要的。少 skill 少 tool = agent 更高效。428 赞。
